display.purpose: Page title only (h1). 28px, weight 650, tight tracking.

body.purpose: All running text, inputs, selects, buttons. 16px floor.

label.purpose: Uppercase field labels and block headings; hierarchy via case + weight + color.

mono.purpose: JSON readout and inline code only — where characters must align.

motion.name: control-transition
motion.purpose: Border/background/filter transitions on inputs and buttons.

breakpoints.name: phone
breakpoints.purpose: Below this, the primary action pins to a fixed bottom bar.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The committing action (Download). Used once per context.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background:#5ac8fa; color:#06222e; border:1px solid #5ac8fa; border-radius:8px; padding:9px 14px; font:600 1rem/1 -apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,'Segoe UI',sans-serif; cursor:pointer; transition:border-color .15s ease, filter .15s ease, transform .05s ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { filter:brightness(1.08); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform:translateY(1px); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline:2px solid #5ac8fa; outline-offset:2px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Quiet actions: Show JSON, Add/Duplicate/Remove block.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { background:#1d242c; color:#e8edf2; border:1px solid #2a313b; border-radius:8px; padding:9px 14px; font:1rem/1 -apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,'Segoe UI',sans-serif; cursor:pointer; transition:border-color .15s ease, transform .05s ease; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { border-color:#8a96a6; } .ds-btn-secondary:active { transform:translateY(1px); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline:2px solid #5ac8fa; outline-offset:2px; }

components.name: Text Field
components.description: Recessed input with a hairline border and Signal-Blue focus ring; 16px text avoids iOS focus-zoom.
components.css: .ds-label { display:block; font:600 .75rem/1.3 -apple-system,sans-serif; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:.05em; color:#8a96a6; margin:0 0 4px; } .ds-input { width:100%; background:#0e1216; color:#e8edf2; border:1px solid #2a313b; border-radius:8px; padding:9px 10px; font:1rem/1.55 -apple-system,sans-serif; transition:border-color .15s ease; } .ds-input:hover { border-color:#8a96a6; } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline:2px solid #5ac8fa; outline-offset:2px; } .ds-input[aria-invalid='true'] { border-color:#ff8a8a; }

components.name: Block Card
components.description: A repeat block: lighter surface inside the body, hairline border, no shadow.
components.css: .ds-card { background:#15191f; border:1px solid #2a313b; border-radius:12px; padding:16px; } .ds-cardhead { display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center; gap:8px; } .ds-h3 { margin:0; font:600 .75rem/1.3 -apple-system,sans-serif; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:.06em; color:#5ac8fa; }

components.name: Status Panel
components.description: Polite live-region feedback. Success names the built file; error summarizes what to fix.
components.html: Built N2R-Day-1.workout (14 steps). On a Mac, AirDrop it to your iPhone → tap it → Fitness → Add.
components.css: .ds-status { margin:16px 0 0; padding:11px 13px; border-radius:8px; border:1px solid #2a313b; font:1rem/1.5 -apple-system,sans-serif; } .ds-status--ok { color:#7ee0a0; border-color:rgba(126,224,160,.4); background:rgba(126,224,160,.08); } .ds-status--err { color:#ff8a8a; border-color:rgba(255,138,138,.4); background:rgba(255,138,138,.08); }

narrative.overview: A rugged, exact logging device rendered as a web page. It opens in a dark, low-glare surface and stays out of the way while you enter intervals; its single job is to capture what you describe and record it as a valid Apple .workout file. Trust is earned by precision, not persuasion. Built on three near-black surfaces separated by hairline borders, one cool signal color that marks only what is live, and a strict three-step type scale.
keyCharacteristics: Dark, low-glare working surface — built to be read, not admired.
One accent (Signal Blue) reserved for live/actionable elements only.
Flat by doctrine: depth comes from tonal layering and hairlines, never shadow.
A three-size type scale; hierarchy beyond that is weight, case, and color.
The form mirrors the workout it builds (warmup → repeat blocks → cooldown).

rules.name: The Signal Rule
rules.body: Signal Blue (#5ac8fa) is reserved for what is live or actionable — primary action, links, current-item headings, focus. If a blue element isn't interactive or doesn't indicate state, it's wrong.

rules.name: The Three-Surface Rule
rules.body: Depth is exactly three near-black steps — Recorder Black (#0b0d10) → Recess (#0e1216) → Slate Panel (#15191f) — divided by Hairline (#2a313b). Never a fourth surface or a shadow.

rules.name: The Three-Step Rule
rules.body: Exactly three sizes exist: 12px, 16px, 28px. If an element seems to need a fourth size, change its weight, case, or color instead.

rules.name: The Flat Rule
rules.body: No box-shadow, anywhere. If something needs to feel separate, step its background one surface lighter and draw a Hairline border.

dos: Do reserve Signal Blue (#5ac8fa) for live and actionable elements only (The Signal Rule).
Do keep depth flat: tonal surface steps + hairline borders, never a shadow (The Flat Rule).
Do hold the type scale to three sizes — 12 / 16 / 28px — and carry finer hierarchy with weight, case, and color (The Three-Step Rule).
Do keep body and input text at 16px to stay legible and avoid iOS focus-zoom.
Do confirm every successful action with a status line that names the file and the next step; report errors inline, in plain language, beside the field.
Do give every control a visible Signal-Blue focus ring and a ≥44px touch target on coarse pointers.
donts: Don't look like a hardcore-gym app: no aggressive red/black, no bold italics, no 'no pain no gain' intensity.
Don't look like a generic SaaS landing page: no gradient hero, no three-card feature grid, no marketing scaffolding or tracked-uppercase eyebrows on every section.
Don't look like a cluttered consumer fitness app: no activity rings, gamified badges, streaks, or ad density.
Don't drift toy or childish: no mascots, no bubbly over-rounding, no playfulness that undercuts 'this produces a real, correct file.'
Don't introduce a second accent hue or a fourth type size — the restraint is the identity.
Don't use glassmorphism or a backdrop blur for the mobile action bar; use a solid fill and a hairline.
Don't surface a raw exception string to the user — validate before building and explain the fix.
